description: You are a Compensation Analyst preparing for an OFCCP pay equity audit. Using the HR_ANALYST schema (hr_analyst/HrAnalyst2024 on XEPDB1) and the EMPLOYEE_STATS table, develop statistical views and a predictive function. Create the view DEPT_INCOME_ANOVA_VW to test monthly_income variance across departments using STATS_ONE_WAY_ANOVA, returning f_ratio and p_value. Create the view GENDER_PAY_TTEST_VW to compare male and female monthly_income means by job_role using STATS_T_TEST_INDEP, outputting job_role, t_statistic, p_value, and an 'is_significant' flag ('Y' if p_value < 0.05). Create the view ATTRITION_PROMO_XCT_VW to analyze Attrition against a promotion status flag ('Recent' if years_since_last_promotion <= 1, else 'Old') using STATS_CROSSTAB, returning chisq_stat and p_value. Implement a PL/SQL function FN_INCOME_MODEL(p_job_role VARCHAR2, p_years_at_company NUMBER) that calculates expected income using REGR_SLOPE and REGR_INTERCEPT for the specified role, returning 0 if no data is found. Export the results of GENDER_PAY_TTEST_VW with column headers to /home/ga/Documents/exports/gender_pay_audit.csv.

metadata.occupation: Compensation, Benefits, and Job Analysis Specialists
